title: Amethyst Equipment
description: Adds amethyst armor and tools to Minecraft: 1.21.2+
body:
This datapack adds amethyst armor and tools to Minecraft: 1.21.2+! The stats are between iron and diamond, with all of them having the same armor as diamond but no armor toughness, which is found only in diamond and netherite.

If you want to use this in a video/post/site/etc. you may do so as long as you credit me for this datapack.

Join my discord!
https://discord.gg/fYyf9WPD

**Installation**: Unzip amethyst-equipment-dp.zip and drag the folder into your datapacks folder. Unzip amethyst-equipment-rp.zip and drag it into into your resourcepacks folder. Then go into minecraft and type /reload. Also go to options>resourcepacks and enable amethyst-equipment-rp. Also note that this will only work in 1.21.2+. Now you're all set! you can now craft amethyst tools and armor in Minecraft!
